title: Trump shot in sniper attack, gunman killed, Biden condemns
shortDescription: 'I was shot with a bullet that pierced the upper part of my right ear,' Trump said of the assassinatin attempt.

title: Vance, Rubio, Burgum respond to shooting at Trump rally
shortDescription: The three finalists to be Donald Trump's vice presidential pick offered rapid responses to the attempted assassination attempt.

title: Watch live from Butler PA as investigation begins after Trump rally
shortDescription: Watch live from Butler, PA as agents begin investigating an attempted assassination Donald Trump after a shooting at a rally Saturday.

title: Uncertainty over security at RNC after shooting at Trump Rally
shortDescription: Less than 36 hours before thousands gather for the Republican National Convention attention shifts to security after shots fired at Trump rally

title: See in photos how a shooting at Donald Trump's rally unfolded
shortDescription: Republican presidential candidate and former President Donald Trump was injured and rushed off stage during a shooting at his rally in Pennsylvania.

title: Biden briefs reporters after Trump rally shooting: Watch video
shortDescription: During a briefing, Biden said he was trying to call Trump to speak with him. "There is no place in America for this kind of violence. It's sick."

title: 'It's sick': Joe Biden condemns shooting at Donald Trump rally
shortDescription: President Joe Biden urges all Americans to condemn attack on his political opponent, Donald Trump, at a rally in Pennsylvania.

title: President Joe Biden on Trump rally shooting
shortDescription: President Joe Biden condemned political violence after Trump injured during shooting.

title: Trump supporters react to shooting
shortDescription: Supporters of former President Donald Trump shared their concern after he was rushed from a stage after apparent gunshots.

title: Video shows chaotic moment when Trump was reportedly shot at rally
shortDescription: At least six bangs that sound like gunfire are heard while Trump is on stage - some as he stands behind a podium and after he appears to crouch down.

title: Watch moment Trump injured at rally
shortDescription: Watch the moment that President Donald Trump was rushed off stage after loud popping sounds rang out at Pennsylvania rally.

title: What to know about Butler, PA, site of Trump rally Saturday
shortDescription: A rally in Butler County, Pennsylvania, where Trump enjoys strong support, ended with the candidate rushed off stage after shots were fired Saturday.

title: Photos: Trump rushed off stage after shooting
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump was rushed off stage after a shooting occurred as he was speaking to supporters in Butler, Pennsylvania.

title: Trump 'safe' after shooting at rally
shortDescription: Donald Trump was rushed from the stage after shots were fired at a Pennsylvania campaign event Saturday.

title: Former President Donald Trump rushed from stage
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump was rushed off stage by U.S. Secret Service after popping noises rattled the crowd.

title: 'Herb Kohl Way' briefly becomes 'Donald J. Trump Way' ahead of RNC
shortDescription: Workers setting up for the RNC briefly covered a sign for "Herb Kohl Way" outside Fiserv Forum with a new one that read "Donald J. Trump Way."

title: The Macho convention: Republicans appeal to men with UFC's Dana White
shortDescription: The GOP has long held leads among men in presidential elections. At the Republican convention, the party wants to continue to make strides with young men.

title: Tucker Carlson and Amber Rose among speakers to back Trump at RNC
shortDescription: The Republican National Convention will feature speakers like Tucker Carlson, Amber Rose and Lee Greenwood as Donald Trump is nominated for president.

title: Melania Trump to join former President Donald Trump at GOP convention
shortDescription: The former first lady has been little-seen on the campaign trail

title: Bernie Sanders will do all he can to get Biden reelected: NYT op-ed
shortDescription: Biden has faced pressure from those within his party to step aside in the 2024 presidential election.

title: Donald Trump speaks in Pennsylvania; will his running mate be there?
shortDescription: Former president and presumptive 2024 Republican nominee Donald Trump holds his last pre-convention rally Saturday

title: 3 ways a Trump administration could erode voting rights: ACLU study
shortDescription: As Donald Trump prepares to accept the Republican presidential nomination, the ACLU warns that his administration would make it harder to vote.

title: Biden vows to stay as crowd goes wild at raucous Detroit rally
shortDescription: President Joe Biden took his campaign to Michigan Friday in a push to shift attention from the battle in his party to Donald Trump and Project 2025.

title: Biden, Trump in dead heat despite calls for president to step aside
shortDescription: Recent polling suggests that Biden, Trump are locked in a dead heat despite calls for the president to step aside.

title: Voters back home tell Dems to drop Biden
shortDescription: Democratic lawmakers are facing pressure from their constituents to call for Biden to drop out and some are up for reelection.
